description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a dark hip roof and a clean, geometric facade. The front features a covered porch supported by columns, large windows, and a driveway with a parked car. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of light and dark gray materials, likely concrete or stucco, with some stone or brick accents. The house sits on a rectangular plot with a paved driveway and green lawn areas on either side. The rear of the house includes a spacious balcony or terrace on the upper floor, and the windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern. The overall design is contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark hip roof, large windows, and a covered front porch, set on a rectangular plot with a driveway and green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch with columns, large windows, driveway, and a car parked in front.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the solid wall with minimal windows, the driveway extending to the side, and the car parked away from the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the upper-floor balcony or terrace, rear windows, and the back lawn area.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a mix of windows and solid wall sections, the driveway, and the car positioned further from the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large windows on the front and rear, minimal windows on the sides
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, wide steps, and a prominent main door beneath an overhang
